summary: Added and tested a deny-by-default Cloudflare Pages URL authority policy so future deployment proof must bind the Wrangler deployment URL to an immutable hash-labeled origin under the expected project, while treating branch and production URLs only as mutable aliases.
remaining_blocker: Configure the cloudflare-research GitHub environment with CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN, dispatch the deployment workflow, and exercise the URL policy against the real Wrangler outputs.
handoff: Wire cloudflare-pages-url-policy.mjs into .github/workflows/cloudflare-pages-research.yml immediately after deployment output capture and before served-identity verification; include its result in the signed deployment proof packet.
privacy_boundary: No secret values, account IDs, private material, health claims, or user content were stored.
